title: araujia stuckertiana subsp. stuckertiana
intro: Araujia stuckertiana subsp. stuckertiana, also known as the 'Devil's Claw', is a plant species that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, as it contains a group of iridoid glycosides known as harpagoside, which has anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving effects. The health benefits of Araujia stuckertiana subsp. stuckertiana include relief from arthritis, fibromyalgia, and other inflammatory conditions. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or topical cream for its medicinal purposes, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional due to potential side effects.
